title: Interactive Fiber Analysis of Bivariate Fields
short: Efficient algorithms and interfaces for bringing Reeb-space based bivariate analysis into practical use.
description: This project develops scalable computational frameworks for Reeb spaces, Jacobi sets, and related multivariate topological structures with emphasis on interactive exploration of bivariate scientific fields.

title: Topology-Driven Visualization of Electronic Structure Evolution
short: Visual analysis of donor-acceptor behavior, electronic transitions, and molecular electronic structure evolution.
description: This line of work uses bivariate fields, continuous scatterplots, image moments, and topological analysis to study molecular electronic transitions and light-induced electronic structure changes.

title: Topology-Aware Volume Fusion for Spectral CT
short: Feature-preserving fusion of multi-energy spectral CT volumes using histograms and extremum graphs.
description: This project explores topology-aware fusion strategies that preserve salient anatomical structures while reducing dimensionality and improving compatibility with standard CT visualization workflows.

title: Feature Tracking in Time-Varying Data
short: Topology-based simplification and tracking of features in time-varying scalar and bivariate fields.
description: This research studies Jacobi sets and related structures for extracting, simplifying, and tracking topological features over time in scientific datasets.
